message:
fix(gateway): replace insecure Math.random() with crypto.getRandomValues()

Systematically replaced all instances of Math.random() for ID generation
with cryptographically secure crypto.getRandomValues() across multiple
services:

- alerts.ts: Alert ID generation
- metrics.ts: Metrics snapshot ID generation
- agent-ws.ts: WebSocket connection ID generation
- conflict.service.ts: Conflict ID generation
- agent.ts: Agent ID generation

Also fixed unused @ts-expect-error directive in idempotency.ts by using
proper type assertion for Hono internal mutation.

These changes improve security by making IDs unpredictable, preventing
potential enumeration attacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
